messages.content: I want you to act as a scientific Chinese-English translator, I will provide you with some paragraphs in one language and your task is to accurately and academically translate the paragraphs only into the other language. Do not repeat the original provided paragraphs after translation. You should use artificial itntelligence tools, such as natural language processing, and rhetorical knowledge and experience about effective writing techniques to reply. I will give you my paragraphs as follows.
Sure, I'll do my best to provide accurate and academically translated versions of your paragraphs from Chinese to English. Please go ahead and provide me with your paragraphs.
随着现代社会的快速发展，能源危机和环境问题日益严重。
With the rapid development of modern society, energy crisis and environmental issues are becoming increasingly serious.
China has launched the dual carbon goals.
光伏、风能等可再生能源的缺点是不易储存、效率低
The disadvantages of renewable energy sources such as solar power and wind energy include difficulties in storage and low efficiency.
然而，氢气生产成本高，易爆，储存和运输成本高
However, hydrogen production is associated with high costs, explosion risks, and expensive storage and transportation.
所以人们提出采用氢含量相对较高的氨燃料作为替代燃料。
Therefore, people have proposed the use of ammonia fuel with higher hydrogen content as an alternative fuel.
氨是一种理想的可再生无碳燃料和储氢载体，与氧气完全燃烧产生氮气和水，没有SOX或烟尘排放
Ammonia is an ideal renewable, carbon-free fuel, and hydrogen carrier. It undergoes complete combustion with oxygen to produce nitrogen and water, without emitting SOx or particulate matter.
在实践中，氨很难完全燃烧，燃烧过程中不可避免地产生NOx
In practice, it is challenging to achieve complete combustion of ammonia, and its combustion process unavoidably generates NOx emissions.
为了使氨气可以满足能源供应的需求，并减少气体污染物的产生，有必要充分了解氨气燃烧的机理和氮氧化物的排放特性。

To meet the energy demand and minimize the generation of gas pollutants, it is crucial to have a comprehensive understanding of the combustion mechanisms of ammonia and the emission characteristics of nitrogen oxides (NOx).
